subject: refactor(debug): single DEBUG_PILL_ENABLED flag gates both mounts
body:
The temporary "always-on" behaviour was previously spread across two
decisions — the web mount require() and the native inline require() —
which meant reverting to __DEV__-only would require remembering to
change both. Collapsed to one constant at the top of the block so the
web and native paths can't drift out of sync.

Tags: debug, refactor, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-pill-hardening
Semver: patch

title: single DEBUG_PILL_ENABLED flag gates both mounts
